wiki_catalogs.name: Project Overview
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for the Web_HoTroPhatAmEN English pronunciation learning application project overview. Explain the project's purpose as a Vietnamese-focused English pronunciation training platform, its core mission of helping Vietnamese learners master English pronunciation through AI-powered assessment, and its unique value proposition. Document the target audience, key features including IPA analysis, instant feedback, gamification elements, and mobile-first design. Include the technology stack overview covering Next.js frontend, FastAPI backend, PostgreSQL database, and Web Speech API integration. Provide context about the educational methodology, accessibility features, and the overall learning experience. Use terminology consistent with the codebase and include practical examples demonstrating the application's capabilities.

wiki_catalogs.name: Introduction and Purpose
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for the Web_HoTroPhatAmEN project introduction and purpose. Explain the project's mission to bridge the gap between Vietnamese learners and English pronunciation mastery. Document the problem statement addressing common pronunciation challenges faced by Vietnamese speakers learning English. Detail the project's educational philosophy, target demographic, and expected learning outcomes. Include the project's vision for becoming a leading pronunciation learning platform. Provide context about the cultural and linguistic background that informs the application's design choices. Use clear, accessible language suitable for stakeholders and potential users.

wiki_catalogs.name: Next.js Application Structure
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Next.js application structure. Document the file-based routing system, app directory structure, and page conventions. Explain the root layout configuration, metadata management, and internationalization setup. Cover the global styling approach using Tailwind CSS, font loading strategies, and theme provider implementation. Detail the build configuration, TypeScript setup, and development workflow. Include guidance on folder organization, naming conventions, and best practices for scalable Next.js applications.

wiki_catalogs.name: System Design Patterns
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the system design patterns used in Web_HoTroPhatAmEN. Detail the layered architecture pattern separating presentation, business logic, and data layers. Document the Repository pattern implementation using Prisma ORM for data access abstraction. Explain the Factory pattern used for dynamic exercise and question creation, Observer pattern for real-time gamification updates, and MVC pattern for model-view-controller separation. Include component relationships, architectural decisions, and how these patterns contribute to maintainability and scalability. Provide code examples showing pattern implementations and their benefits.

wiki_catalogs.name: Web Speech API Integration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for Web Speech API integration in the pronunciation learning system. Explain the browser-based speech recognition implementation, microphone permissions handling, and cross-browser compatibility considerations. Document the SpeechRecognition API usage patterns, event handling for speech detection, and real-time transcription processing. Include concrete examples from the useSpeechRecognition hook showing state management, error handling, and browser capability detection. Address common issues like microphone access permissions, speech recognition language settings, and fallback mechanisms for unsupported browsers. Provide troubleshooting guidance for speech recognition failures and performance optimization techniques.

wiki_catalogs.name: Exercise Architecture and Rendering
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the exercise architecture and rendering engine. Explain the server-side exercise loading mechanism, client-side rendering patterns, and dynamic content delivery. Document the ExerciseEngineClient component architecture, exercise state management, and real-time rendering capabilities. Detail the exercise lifecycle from loading to completion, including error handling and fallback mechanisms. Cover the integration between server-side data fetching and client-side interactive components. Include implementation patterns for exercise progression, navigation, and user interface updates. Address performance optimization techniques and memory management for complex exercises.

wiki_catalogs.name: XP and Scoring System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the XP calculation and scoring algorithms. Detail the exercise reward calculation system including base XP, daily bonuses, retake XP, and ranking delta calculations. Explain the scoring formula that converts exercise scores to XP points, including first attempt bonuses, improvement multipliers, and retake penalties. Document the XP-to-level progression system using the square root formula, level-up requirements, and progression mechanics. Include concrete examples showing how different exercise outcomes affect XP accumulation, with specific calculations for various score scenarios. Address the relationship between exercise performance and XP rewards, bonus structures for daily completion targets, and how scoring impacts overall user progression.

wiki_catalogs.name: Prisma Schema and Data Models
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Prisma schema definition and data models. Detail all entity definitions including User, Role, Exercise, Question, Phoneme, SoundGroup, and gamification entities. Document field types, constraints, default values, and validation rules. Explain the complete entity relationship diagram showing foreign key relationships, one-to-many and many-to-many associations. Include Prisma model syntax explanations, unique constraints, indexes, and database provider configuration. Document UUID generation strategies, timestamps, and soft delete patterns. Provide examples of model inheritance patterns and relation definitions.

wiki_catalogs.name: FastAPI Application Architecture
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the FastAPI application architecture. Document the main application initialization, middleware configuration including CORS settings, and core service setup. Explain the application factory pattern, settings management through environment variables, and database connection handling. Detail the health check endpoints, service metadata configuration, and application lifecycle management. Include examples of configuration loading, environment-specific settings, and service discovery patterns. Address application startup sequence, dependency injection patterns, and service registration processes.

wiki_catalogs.name: Component Library Overview
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the UI component library overview. Describe the component architecture, design philosophy, and usage patterns across all UI components including Button, Input, Card, Modal, ProgressBar, and Badge. Document component props, variants, sizes, and customization options. Include import patterns, usage examples, and integration guidelines. Explain component composition principles, reusability patterns, and best practices for consistent UI development. Address component states, interactive behaviors, and responsive design considerations. Provide guidelines for extending components and maintaining design system consistency.

wiki_catalogs.name: NextAuth Configuration and Setup
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for NextAuth configuration and setup. Explain the authConfig object structure, provider configuration, and callback functions. Document the JWT token handling mechanism, session management, and user role assignment. Include concrete examples of configuring authentication providers, setting up callback functions for token and session manipulation, and integrating NextAuth with the application routing system. Address provider array configuration, page redirection settings, and security configurations. Provide step-by-step setup instructions and common configuration patterns.

wiki_catalogs.name: Admin Interface and Navigation
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the admin interface architecture and navigation system. Document the admin dashboard layout, sidebar navigation, and main content areas. Explain the client-side dashboard implementation, data fetching patterns, and real-time updates. Detail the admin-only routing system, permission checks, and security measures. Include the dashboard data structure, prop passing mechanisms, and component composition patterns. Address responsive design considerations, accessibility features, and user experience optimizations. Document the integration with Next.js app router and server-side rendering approaches.

wiki_catalogs.name: Exercise and Content APIs
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive API documentation for exercise and content management endpoints. Document the exercise retrieval API for fetching pronunciation exercises by ID, the exercise submission API for processing user responses and scoring, topic-based content APIs for curriculum organization, learning map APIs for progress tracking, and level APIs for difficulty progression. Include detailed request/response schemas, parameter specifications, authentication requirements, and error handling patterns. Provide practical examples showing how clients interact with each endpoint, including exercise content structure, submission formats, and response validation. Address performance considerations, caching strategies, and rate limiting policies.

wiki_catalogs.name: Environment Configuration and Setup
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive environment configuration documentation for the pronunciation learning platform. Document development, staging, and production environment setup including Node.js and Python runtime requirements. Explain environment variables configuration, database connection settings, and API endpoint configurations. Detail local development setup with Docker alternatives, Prisma configuration for different environments, and Next.js environment-specific settings. Include security considerations for environment variables, SSL certificate setup, and OAuth configuration for different environments. Provide step-by-step setup guides for developers and system administrators. Document troubleshooting common environment configuration issues and validation procedures.

wiki_catalogs.name: Linguistic and Phonetic Research
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the linguistic and phonetic research foundation of the pronunciation learning platform. Document the International Phonetic Alphabet (IPA) system integration, including the 44 phonemes and their categorization into vowels, consonants, and diphthongs. Explain the Vietnamese learners' pronunciation challenges and target sounds. Detail the phonetic analysis methodology, sound production mechanics, and acoustic properties. Include the CMU Pronouncing Dictionary integration, minimal pairs methodology from 'Ship or Sheep', and evidence-based pronunciation instruction. Document the 30 sound groups structure, vowel and consonant classification systems, and connected speech patterns. Address the pedagogical implications of phonetic accuracy, error analysis, and pronunciation acquisition theories.

wiki_catalogs.name: Advanced Speech Recognition Features
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the advanced three-stage phoneme identification system. Explain the implementation of progressive difficulty levels in listening exercises, from word+audio+IPA display to skeleton-based identification and pure audio recognition. Document the phoneme filtering algorithm, contrast phoneme construction, and skeleton building mechanisms. Detail the exact-match scoring system for IPA phonemes versus normalized matching for words. Include technical implementation of the buildListenChooseQuestions helper, stage-based rendering logic, and the specialized exercise engine. Address the integration of Web Speech API for pronunciation assessment and the adaptive difficulty progression system.

wiki_catalogs.name: Getting Started
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive getting started documentation for the Web_HoTroPhatAmEN project. Include detailed prerequisites covering Node.js, Python, PostgreSQL, and browser requirements. Provide step-by-step installation instructions for both frontend and backend components, including dependency installation, environment variable configuration, and database setup. Document the development server startup process, port configurations, and initial project verification steps. Include first-run instructions covering database seeding, OAuth setup, and basic application walkthrough. Address common setup issues and troubleshooting tips. Provide guidance for different development environments and deployment scenarios.

wiki_catalogs.name: Key Features and Capabilities
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the Web_HoTroPhatAmEN key features and capabilities. Document the core functionality including AI-powered pronunciation assessment, interactive speech recognition, comprehensive exercise system with multiple question types, gamification elements with XP system and streak tracking, achievement badges, and leaderboard functionality. Explain the IPA symbol mastery system, minimal pairs exercises, connected speech practice, and personalized learning paths. Detail the real-time feedback mechanisms, progress tracking capabilities, and adaptive difficulty scaling. Include the administrative dashboard features for content management and user analytics. Provide concrete examples of user workflows and demonstrate how each feature contributes to the overall learning experience.

wiki_catalogs.name: UI Components Library
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the UI components library. Document reusable components including Button, Card, Input, Modal, and ProgressBar components. Explain component props, styling patterns, and customization options. Cover layout components like Navbar, Footer, and ThemeToggle. Include usage examples, accessibility features, and responsive design considerations. Document component composition patterns, prop interfaces, and integration guidelines. Address styling consistency, theme support, and component testing strategies.

wiki_catalogs.name: Technology Stack
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed technology stack documentation for Web_HoTroPhatAmEN. Document the frontend stack including Next.js 16.2.7, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, React 18.3.1, and WaveSurfer.js 7.12.7 for audio visualization. Detail the backend stack with FastAPI 0.115.0, Python, and PostgreSQL database. Explain the database stack using Prisma 6.19.3 ORM. Document the speech recognition technology using Web Speech API, authentication system with NextAuth 5.0.0-beta.31, and gamification libraries like Canvas Confetti. Include version compatibility, upgrade paths, and rationale for technology choices. Provide dependency management and build configuration details.

wiki_catalogs.name: Audio Processing Pipeline
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the audio processing pipeline including waveform visualization and audio recording capabilities. Document the WaveSurfer.js integration for audio visualization, real-time waveform rendering, and audio file processing. Explain the audio recording workflow from microphone input to processed audio data, including noise reduction, audio normalization, and format conversion. Include examples of waveform analysis for pronunciation assessment, audio quality metrics, and performance optimization for real-time audio processing. Address technical considerations like audio buffer management, memory usage optimization, and cross-browser audio compatibility. Document the integration with speech recognition services and audio feedback mechanisms.

wiki_catalogs.name: Question Types and Formats
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for all question types and formats used in the pronunciation exercises. Detail the implementation of multiple-choice questions, speaking exercises (minimal pairs, sentences, words), and stress identification tasks. Document the specific components for assimilation, linking, weak vowel questions, and waveform-based pronunciation tasks. Explain question rendering patterns, user interaction handling, and input validation for each format. Include examples of question data structures, accepted answer formats, and scoring mechanisms. Address accessibility considerations for different question types and provide implementation guidelines for adding new question formats.

wiki_catalogs.name: Streak and Daily Check-in
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the streak tracking and daily check-in system. Explain the streak calculation algorithm including consecutive day detection, break handling, and streak freeze mechanics. Document the daily check-in interface components, reward popup system, and streak visualization elements. Detail the streak freeze functionality for maintaining streaks during missed days, gem-based streak protection, and recovery mechanisms. Include implementation examples showing streak state management, date-based calculations, and user interaction patterns. Address streak progression milestones, reward structures for different streak lengths, and how streak data integrates with the broader gamification system. Document the UI components for displaying streak status, check-in buttons, and reward notifications.

wiki_catalogs.name: Data Relationships and Constraints
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for database relationships and referential constraints. Explain primary key and foreign key relationships between entities like User-Role, Exercise-Topic-Level-LearningMap, Question-QuestionType, and phoneme-sound group associations. Document cascade delete behaviors, restrict patterns, and set null scenarios. Detail unique constraints, composite keys, and index strategies. Explain many-to-many relationships through junction tables like SoundGroupPhoneme and UserBadge. Document constraint validation rules, data integrity enforcement, and referential integrity maintenance. Include examples of relationship queries and join patterns used throughout the application.

wiki_catalogs.name: API Endpoints and Routing
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed API documentation covering all backend endpoints and routing patterns. wiki_catalogs.name: Design System and Theming

Include guidelines for maintaining design consistency, brand guidelines adherence, and responsive design breakpoints. Address design token management and customization patterns.

wiki_catalogs.name: Pronunciation Assessment Algorithm
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the pronunciation assessment algorithm and accuracy scoring system. wiki_catalogs.name: Badge and Achievement System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the badge and achievement system. Detail the badge definition structure including COMMON, RARE, EPIC, and PERIODIC rarity tiers, progress categories, and achievement conditions. Explain the badge progression tracking system that monitors user statistics like completed exercises, high scores, streak counts, and ranking positions. Document the automatic badge awarding mechanism that evaluates user progress against badge criteria and awards achievements accordingly. Include examples of all badge types: progress badges (first exercise, ten exercises), skill badges (good listener, clear speaker), streak badges (3-day, 7-day, 14-day), improvement badges (comeback), and ranking badges (weekly top 10). Address badge rarity tiers, visual representation differences, and how badges integrate with user profile displays and progress tracking.

Include examples showing how leaderboard periods are calculated, score weighting systems, tie-breaking rules, and ranking updates. Address the integration between exercise scoring and leaderboard positioning, how streak bonuses affect rankings, and the relationship between individual performance and competitive elements. Document the periodic nature of ranking systems, how scores decay or persist over time, and the impact of different exercise types on ranking performance.

wiki_catalogs.name: Data Management and Seeding
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop comprehensive documentation for data management workflows including seeding, cleanup, and content management. Detail the lesson seeding process, audio file management, and demo data setup procedures. Document data migration strategies, schema evolution patterns, and backward compatibility maintenance. Explain content curation workflows for phonemes, words, minimal pairs, and sentence items. Document data validation processes, quality assurance checks, and content approval workflows. Include database cleanup procedures, data archival strategies, and retention policy implementation. Address bulk operations, data transformation scripts, and content synchronization between local and production environments.

wiki_catalogs.name: Authentication and Security
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed authentication and security documentation covering user authentication, authorization, and access control mechanisms. Document the NextAuth integration, OAuth providers configuration, and session management. Explain JWT token handling, user role-based access control, and permission systems. Detail security middleware implementation, input validation, and protection against common vulnerabilities. Include examples of authentication flows, session handling, and user registration processes. Address security best practices, encryption standards, and audit logging. Document API security patterns, rate limiting, and protection against brute force attacks.

wiki_catalogs.name: Component Usage and Customization
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for component usage patterns and customization guidelines. Provide comprehensive usage examples for all components with practical code snippets and real-world scenarios. Document component composition patterns, prop drilling strategies, and state management integration. Explain customization techniques including Tailwind CSS class overrides, component extension patterns, and theme customization. Detail integration with Next.js routing, form handling, and state management libraries. Include performance optimization techniques, lazy loading strategies, and component bundling considerations. Address common usage patterns, anti-patterns, and troubleshooting guides for component integration challenges.

wiki_catalogs.name: User Profile and Permissions
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop comprehensive content for user profile management and permission systems. Explain user role-based access control, admin privileges, and user data management. Document the user profile structure, role assignment, and permission checking mechanisms. Include concrete examples of implementing admin-only routes, user data CRUD operations, and role-based UI rendering. Explain the integration between authentication roles and application features, permission inheritance, and dynamic access control. Address user profile updates, role modifications, and audit trail requirements. Document the relationship between authenticated sessions and administrative capabilities.

wiki_catalogs.name: Reports and Insights
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for reporting and insights generation within the admin system. Detail the analytics dashboard components, data visualization libraries, and reporting interfaces. Document the exercise completion analytics, user progress tracking, and performance metrics. Explain the data aggregation patterns, time-series analysis, and trend identification features. Include implementation details for report generation, export capabilities, and custom reporting filters. Address real-time data updates, caching strategies, and performance optimization for large datasets. Document the integration with external analytics platforms and data export formats.

wiki_catalogs.name: Admin and Management APIs
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed API documentation for administrative management endpoints. Document exercise management APIs for CRUD operations on pronunciation exercises, question management APIs for exercise content editing, level management APIs for difficulty progression control, and topic management APIs for curriculum organization. Include comprehensive admin workflows, content approval processes, user management capabilities, and analytics reporting. Provide examples of exercise creation, question editing, level configuration, and topic structuring. Address role-based access control, audit trails, content validation, and bulk operations for large-scale content management.

wiki_catalogs.name: Scaling and Infrastructure
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed scaling and infrastructure documentation for the pronunciation learning platform. Document horizontal and vertical scaling strategies for Next.js frontend and FastAPI backend components. Explain load balancing configuration, auto-scaling policies, and database connection pooling. Include infrastructure requirements for different traffic scales, CDN configuration for audio assets, and caching strategies for improved performance. Detail microservices architecture considerations, container orchestration with Kubernetes, and cloud provider specific configurations. Document cost optimization strategies, resource allocation policies, and performance benchmarking procedures. Provide guidance for disaster recovery planning, high availability setup, and geographic distribution strategies.

wiki_catalogs.name: AI and Machine Learning Research
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the artificial intelligence and machine learning research foundations of the pronunciation assessment system. Document the speech recognition technologies, acoustic modeling approaches, and pronunciation evaluation algorithms. Explain the Web Speech API integration, real-time audio processing, and voice quality assessment methods. Detail the AI skills inventory, natural language processing capabilities, and automated feedback generation. Include the research methodologies for speech analysis accuracy, confidence scoring, and error detection. Document the machine learning model architectures, feature extraction techniques, and pattern recognition algorithms. Address the AI ethics considerations, bias mitigation strategies, and algorithmic fairness in pronunciation assessment. Cover the integration of AI assistants, intelligent tutoring systems, and adaptive assessment technologies.

wiki_catalogs.name: Performance and Scalability Enhancements
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for performance optimization and scalability improvements across the platform. Document the data layer v2 architecture, summary redesign implementations, and system-wide performance enhancements. Explain the database optimization strategies, caching mechanisms, and load balancing approaches. Detail the frontend performance improvements, bundle optimization, and lazy loading implementations. Include monitoring and observability setups, performance metrics collection, and scalability planning. Address the technical debt reduction strategies, codebase modernization efforts, and infrastructure scaling considerations for handling increased user loads.

wiki_catalogs.name: Speech Recognition System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the speech recognition and pronunciation assessment system. Thoroughly explain the Web Speech API integration, audio recording implementation, and real-time speech processing. Document the pronunciation assessment algorithm, accuracy scoring mechanisms, and feedback generation. Include concrete examples from the actual codebase showing speech recognition hooks, audio visualization components, and waveform analysis. Explain the relationship with backend AI services, data transmission protocols, and result processing. Address common issues like microphone permissions, browser compatibility, and performance optimization. Document configuration options for speech recognition parameters and integration with the exercise system.

wiki_catalogs.name: Exercise Management System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the exercise management and content delivery system. Detail the exercise architecture, question types (multiple choice, speaking, minimal pairs, stress identification), and content management patterns. Document the exercise rendering engine, dynamic content loading, and user interaction handling. Explain the database schema for lessons, exercises, and question content, including relationships and data models. Include implementation details for exercise progression, scoring logic, and feedback mechanisms. Address content seeding, exercise categorization, and personalized learning paths. Document the API integration for exercise retrieval, submission processing, and result evaluation.

wiki_catalogs.name: Gamification Engine
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the gamification and motivation system. Thoroughly explain the XP calculation algorithms, streak tracking mechanisms, and achievement badge system. Document the daily check-in functionality, reward structures, and progress visualization components. Include concrete examples from the actual codebase showing gamification hooks, streak calculations, and leaderboard implementation. Explain the relationship between learning activities and gamification rewards, user engagement patterns, and retention strategies. Address leaderboard functionality, social comparison features, and competitive elements. Document configuration options for gamification parameters, reward scaling, and achievement criteria.

wiki_catalogs.name: Database Design
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive data model documentation for the application's database schema. Detail entity relationships, field definitions, and data types for users, exercises, lessons, pronunciation records, and gamification metrics. Document primary/foreign keys, indexes, and constraints defined in the Prisma schema. Explain data validation rules, business logic constraints, and referential integrity. Include database schema diagrams and sample data structures. Document data access patterns using Prisma ORM, query optimization strategies, and performance considerations. Specify data lifecycle management, retention policies, and archival procedures. Address data migration strategies, version management, and schema evolution. Include data seeding processes, demo data setup, and content management workflows.

wiki_catalogs.name: Backend Services
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive backend service documentation for the FastAPI application. Document the service architecture, API endpoint structure, and request/response handling patterns. Explain the database integration using SQLAlchemy, authentication middleware, and security implementations. Detail the speech processing integration, external API connections, and data transformation logic. Include authentication and authorization mechanisms, session management, and user access control. Document error handling strategies, logging implementation, and monitoring approaches. Address API versioning, rate limiting, and performance optimization. Provide examples of common backend operations, data validation, and business logic implementation.

wiki_catalogs.name: User Interface Components
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the UI component library and design system. Describe the component architecture, design principles, and visual consistency guidelines. Document individual components including buttons, cards, modals, progress bars, and specialized components like the IPA chart and audio recorders. Include usage examples with code snippets, prop definitions, and customization options. Provide guidelines for responsive design, accessibility compliance, and cross-browser compatibility. Document component states, animations, and interactive behaviors. Include style customization through Tailwind CSS classes, theming support, and design token usage. Address component composition patterns, reusability principles, and integration with the overall application architecture.

wiki_catalogs.name: Authentication System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the authentication and user management system. Thoroughly explain the NextAuth integration, OAuth configuration, and session management. Document the user registration and login processes, password reset functionality, and account security measures. Include concrete examples from the actual codebase showing authentication providers, session handling, and protected route implementation. Explain the relationship between frontend authentication state and backend user management, JWT token handling, and user profile synchronization. Address security considerations, CSRF protection, and session expiration. Document Google OAuth setup, alternative authentication providers, and custom authentication flows.

wiki_catalogs.name: Admin Dashboard
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the administrative dashboard and content management system. Detail the admin interface architecture, user management capabilities, and content administration tools. Document the analytics and reporting features, user progress monitoring, and system insights. Explain the exercise management interface, topic and level administration, and content curation tools. Include implementation details for admin-only routes, permission systems, and data visualization components. Address content seeding, bulk operations, and administrative workflows. Document the integration with analytics systems, export capabilities, and reporting dashboards. Provide guidance for admin user onboarding and operational procedures.

wiki_catalogs.name: Testing Strategy
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive testing documentation for the application's quality assurance strategy. Document the unit testing approach using Jest and React Testing Library, integration testing patterns, and end-to-end testing implementation. Explain the testing utilities and helper functions, mock data strategies, and test environment configuration. Include guidance for testing speech recognition components, gamification logic, and database interactions. Address testing best practices for asynchronous operations, API integrations, and user interface components. Document continuous integration testing, automated testing workflows, and quality gates. Provide examples of test cases for critical components and common testing scenarios.

wiki_catalogs.name: Deployment and DevOps
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive deployment and DevOps documentation for the pronunciation learning platform. Document environment configuration, build processes, and deployment pipelines for both frontend and backend components. Explain database migration strategies, production setup, and infrastructure requirements. Include guidance for cloud deployment, containerization options, and CI/CD pipeline configuration. Address monitoring and logging implementation, performance optimization, and security hardening. Document backup strategies, disaster recovery procedures, and maintenance workflows. Provide troubleshooting guides for common deployment issues and production problems. Include scaling considerations, load balancing, and high availability setup.

wiki_catalogs.name: API Reference
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive API documentation for all public endpoints and interfaces. For RESTful APIs, document HTTP methods, URL patterns, request/response schemas, and authentication requirements. Detail the exercise API for content retrieval and submission, check-in API for daily streak tracking, leaderboard API for ranking and progress, and admin APIs for content management. Include request/response examples, parameter specifications, and error handling patterns. Document authentication methods, rate limiting, and API versioning. Address common use cases, client implementation guidelines, and integration patterns. Provide debugging tools, testing approaches, and performance optimization tips. Include migration guides for API changes and backwards compatibility notes.

wiki_catalogs.name: Planning and Roadmap
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the project planning and development roadmap. Document the strategic vision, milestone achievements, and future development plans. Explain the project timeline, feature prioritization, and resource allocation strategies. Include detailed descriptions of planned enhancements, technical improvements, and new feature development. Document the PDCA cycle implementation, progress tracking methodologies, and quality improvement processes. Address research initiatives, academic collaborations, and pedagogical development. Provide insight into the project governance, decision-making processes, and stakeholder engagement. Include documentation of lessons learned, best practices, and continuous improvement strategies.

wiki_catalogs.name: Research and Academic Content
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the research foundation and academic components of the pronunciation learning platform. Document the linguistic research basis, phonetic analysis methodologies, and pedagogical approaches. Explain the IPA pronunciation system integration, vowel and consonant classification, and sound production mechanics. Include academic literature review, research methodologies, and evidence-based learning strategies. Detail the gamification research, motivation theories, and behavioral psychology integration. Address the AI skills inventory, language learning phases, and adaptive learning algorithms. Document the research partnerships, academic validation, and effectiveness studies. Provide guidance for educators, researchers, and language learning professionals.

wiki_catalogs.name: Superpowers and Advanced Features
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for advanced features and specialized implementations. Detail the enhanced speech recognition capabilities, advanced gamification elements, and custom development workflows. Document the specialized phoneme identification system, three-stage listening exercises, and advanced feedback mechanisms. Explain the integration of cutting-edge AI technologies, machine learning algorithms, and adaptive assessment techniques. Include implementation details for experimental features, A/B testing frameworks, and feature experimentation. Address performance optimizations, scalability enhancements, and advanced user experience improvements. Document the research and development processes, innovation pipelines, and future technology integration strategies.

wiki_overview.content:
<blog>

# PhatAmEN - English Pronunciation Learning Application

## Project Introduction

### Purpose Statement
PhatAmEN is an innovative Vietnamese-English pronunciation learning platform designed to help Vietnamese speakers master English pronunciation through AI-powered assessment, gamified learning experiences, and interactive speech training tools.

### Core Goals and Objectives
- **Primary Goal**: Bridge the pronunciation gap between Vietnamese learners and native English speakers
- **Learning Objectives**: 
  - Master phonetic symbols (IPA) and pronunciation patterns
  - Develop accurate speaking skills through interactive exercises
  - Build consistent learning habits via gamification
  - Provide personalized feedback using speech recognition technology

### Target Audience
- Vietnamese learners seeking to improve English pronunciation
- Language learners interested in gamified education platforms
- Students and professionals requiring clear communication skills

## Technical Architecture

### Component Breakdown

The application follows a modern full-stack architecture with clear separation of concerns:

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Frontend - Next.js App] --> B[API Routes]
    B --> C[Prisma ORM]
    C --> D[(PostgreSQL Database)]
    A --> E[Speech Recognition API]
    F[Backend - FastAPI] --> C
    G[Admin Dashboard] --> B
    H[Gamification Engine] --> B
    I[Authentication System] --> B
```

### Design Patterns
- **Layered Architecture**: Clear separation between presentation, business logic, and data layers
- **Repository Pattern**: Used extensively in Prisma for data access
- **Factory Pattern**: For creating different types of exercises and questions
- **Observer Pattern**: For real-time gamification updates

### System Relationships

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant U as User
    participant FE as Frontend
    participant API as API Routes
    participant DB as PostgreSQL
    participant SR as Speech Recognition
    
    U->>FE: Start Exercise
    FE->>API: Fetch Exercise Data
    API->>DB: Query Exercise & Questions
    DB-->>API: Return Data
    API-->>FE: Exercise Content
    FE->>SR: Capture Speech Input
    SR-->>FE: Transcription Result
    FE->>API: Submit Answer
    API->>DB: Update Attempts & Scores
    DB-->>API: Confirm Update
    API-->>FE: Success Response
    FE-->>U: Show Results & Feedback
```

## Key Implementation

### Main Entry Points
- **Frontend**: `english_pronunciation_app/frontend/src/app/layout.tsx` - Root layout with theme provider
- **Backend**: `english_pronunciation_app/backend/app/main.py` - FastAPI service entry point
- **Database**: `english_pronunciation_app/frontend/prisma/schema.prisma` - Prisma schema definition

### Core Modules

#### Speech Recognition System
- **RecordButton Component**: `english_pronunciation_app/frontend/src/components/audio/RecordButton.tsx`
- **Speech Hook**: `english_pronunciation_app/frontend/src/hooks/useSpeechRecognition.ts`
- **Web Speech API Integration**: Real-time speech-to-text processing

#### Gamification Engine
- **Daily Check-in System**: `english_pronunciation_app/frontend/src/components/gamification/DailyCheckIn.tsx`
- **XP & Level Calculation**: `english_pronunciation_app/frontend/src/lib/gamification.ts`
- **Badge System**: Achievement tracking and reward distribution

#### Exercise Management
- **Exercise Pages**: `english_pronunciation_app/frontend/src/app/exercises/[id]/page.tsx`
- **Exercise Engine**: Client-side quiz engine with real-time feedback
- **Question Types**: Multiple choice, speaking, minimal pairs, stress identification

### Configuration Approach
- **TypeScript Configuration**: `english_pronunciation_app/frontend/tsconfig.json`
- **Package Management**: `english_pronunciation_app/frontend/package.json`
- **Environment Variables**: Backend configuration via `english_pronunciation_app/backend/app/core/config.py`

### External Dependencies
Key dependencies include:
- **Next.js 16.2.7**: React framework for frontend
- **Prisma 6.19.3**: Database ORM and migration tool
- **NextAuth 5.0.0-beta.31**: Authentication solution
- **React 18.3.1**: Frontend library
- **WaveSurfer.js 7.12.7**: Audio visualization
- **FastAPI 0.115.0**: Python backend framework

### Integration Points
- **PostgreSQL Database**: Primary data storage
- **Web Speech API**: Browser-based speech recognition
- **Google OAuth**: Third-party authentication
- **Canvas Confetti**: Visual celebration effects

### Component Relationship Diagram

```mermaid
graph LR
    A[Layout Provider] --> B[Navigation Components]
    A --> C[Main Content]
    C --> D[Exercise Engine]
    C --> E[Dashboard]
    C --> F[Admin Panel]
    D --> G[Speech Recognition]
    D --> H[Scoring Engine]
    E --> I[Gamification System]
    F --> J[Data Management]
    G --> K[Audio Visualization]
    H --> L[Feedback System]
```

## Key Features

### Functionality Overview

#### Pronunciation Training
- **IPA Symbol Mastery**: Interactive IPA chart with audio examples
- **Minimal Pairs Practice**: Distinction between similar sounds
- **Connected Speech**: Linking, assimilation, and stress patterns
- **Word & Sentence Practice**: Contextual pronunciation training

#### Gamified Learning Experience
- **Daily Streak System**: Consistent practice rewards
- **Achievement Badges**: Milestone recognition
- **Leaderboard Competition**: Social motivation
- **Level Progression**: Skill-based advancement

#### Assessment & Analytics
- **Real-time Speech Scoring**: Accuracy and fluency evaluation
- **Progress Tracking**: Detailed performance analytics
- **Personalized Recommendations**: Adaptive learning paths
- **Admin Reporting**: Comprehensive usage insights

### Implementation Highlights

#### Speech Recognition Architecture
```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Idle
    Idle --> Listening: Start Recording
    Listening --> Processing: Speech Detected
    Processing --> Result: Analysis Complete
    Result --> Idle: Reset
    Listening --> Idle: Stop/Cancel
    Processing --> Idle: Error
```

#### Exercise Flow
- **Exercise Selection**: Topic-based navigation
- **Question Presentation**: Multi-modal content delivery
- **Interactive Assessment**: Real-time feedback loop
- **Performance Analytics**: Detailed results breakdown

#### Gamification Pipeline
```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[User Action] --> B{Action Type}
    B -->|Exercise Completion| C[XP Calculation]
    B -->|Daily Check-in| D[Streak Management]
    B -->|Score Improvement| E[Badge Evaluation]
    C --> F[Level Up Check]
    D --> G[Streak Freeze Usage]
    E --> H[Achievement Unlocked]
    F --> I[New Level Display]
    G --> J[Continue Streak]
    H --> K[Badge Notification]
    I --> L[Progress Update]
    J --> L
    K --> L
    L --> M[Social Sharing]
```

This comprehensive pronunciation learning platform combines cutting-edge speech technology with proven gamification principles to create an engaging and effective language learning experience tailored specifically for Vietnamese speakers mastering English pronunciation.

---

**Sources:**
- [package.json](english_pronunciation_app/frontend/package.json)
- [tsconfig.json](english_pronunciation_app/frontend/tsconfig.json)
- [layout.tsx](english_pronunciation_app/frontend/src/app/layout.tsx)
- [prisma.ts](english_pronunciation_app/frontend/src/lib/prisma.ts)
- [DailyCheckIn.tsx](english_pronunciation_app/frontend/src/components/gamification/DailyCheckIn.tsx)
- [route.ts](english_pronunciation_app/frontend/src/app/api/checkin/route.ts)
- [page.tsx](english_pronunciation_app/frontend/src/app/exercises/[id]/page.tsx)
- [page.tsx](english_pronunciation_app/frontend/src/app/admin/page.tsx)
- [schema.prisma](english_pronunciation_app/frontend/prisma/schema.prisma)
- [gamification.ts](english_pronunciation_app/frontend/src/lib/gamification.ts)
- [RecordButton.tsx](english_pronunciation_app/frontend/src/components/audio/RecordButton.tsx)
- [useSpeechRecognition.ts](english_pronunciation_app/frontend/src/hooks/useSpeechRecognition.ts)
- [main.py](english_pronunciation_app/backend/app/main.py)
- [config.py](english_pronunciation_app/backend/app/core/config.py)

</blog>
